title: ClickUp official product management positioning
claim: ClickUp markets itself as an everything app for product management that centralizes roadmaps, sprints, feature work, communication, and templates across the product lifecycle.
source_snippet: The product management page highlights one place for the product lifecycle, sprints, automations, and communication.
implication: ProductOS should assume PMs can already centralize work in execution tools, and focus the V5 wedge on trustworthy end-to-end lifecycle reasoning.
followup_questions: How much audit-ready decision context can ClickUp preserve without custom workspace discipline?
